name: chart/heatmap
description: Two-dimensional heatmap with band scales and color-mix cell interpolation.

meta.name: Heatmap
meta.description: Two-dimensional heatmap with band scales and color-mix cell interpolation.

props.name: data
props.type: { x: string; y: string; value: number }[]

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

props.name: plain
props.description: Marks only — no axes, grid lines, or legend. For micro/inline charts.

props.name: visualMap
props.description: Map cell value → CVD-safe colour (continuous or piecewise) via a keyboard-operable legend that filters the visible range.

props.name: toolbox
props.description: Render a keyboard-reachable toolbox — PNG/SVG export, a data-view table toggle, and restore (reset the visualMap filter).

examples.title: Basic heatmap
examples.code:
import { Heatmap } from '@cascivo/charts'

const data = [
  {x:'Mon',y:'AM',value:10},{x:'Mon',y:'PM',value:20},
  {x:'Tue',y:'AM',value:15},{x:'Tue',y:'PM',value:5},
]
<Heatmap data={data} title="Activity" />

whenToUse: Showing magnitude across two categorical dimensions as a color-coded matrix
Spotting patterns, clusters, or hotspots in dense grid data
whenNotToUse: Reading precise values — color encoding is approximate

related.name: Treemap
related.reason: Use for part-to-whole hierarchical magnitude rather than a grid

intent.a11yRationale: Renders with role="img" and requires a title prop for screen reader labeling.
